'''âk-p-p-sh''' ('''kakappeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hillbilly|hillbilly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-p-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hillbilly|hillbilly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-p-p-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kakappeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikapeshoko|thikapeshoko]] || [[word:jikapeshoko|jikapeshoko]] || [[word:shikapeshoko|shikapeshoko]] || [[word:kikapeshoko|kikapeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukapeshoko|thuthukapeshoko]] || [[word:jujukapeshoko|jujukapeshoko]] || [[word:shushukapeshoko|shushukapeshoko]] || [[word:kukukapeshoko|kukukapeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukapeshoko|thukapeshoko]] || [[word:jukapeshoko|jukapeshoko]] || [[word:shukapeshoko|shukapeshoko]] || [[word:kukapeshoko|kukapeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukapeshoko|thukapeshoko]] || [[word:jukapeshoko|jukapeshoko]] || [[word:shukapeshoko|shukapeshoko]] || [[word:kukapeshoko|kukapeshoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokapeshoko|thothokapeshoko]] || [[word:jojokapeshoko|jojokapeshoko]] || [[word:shoshokapeshoko|shoshokapeshoko]] || [[word:kokokapeshoko|kokokapeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokapeshoko|thokapeshoko]] || [[word:jokapeshoko|jokapeshoko]] || [[word:shokapeshoko|shokapeshoko]] || [[word:kokapeshoko|kokapeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokapeshoko|thokapeshoko]] || [[word:jokapeshoko|jokapeshoko]] || [[word:shokapeshoko|shokapeshoko]] || [[word:kokapeshoko|kokapeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkapeshoko|thĂŠkapeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkapeshoko|jĂŠkapeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkapeshoko|shĂŠkapeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkapeshoko|kĂŠkapeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakapeshoko|thathakapeshoko]] || [[word:jajakapeshoko|jajakapeshoko]] || [[word:shashakapeshoko|shashakapeshoko]] || [[word:kakakapeshoko|kakakapeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakapeshoko|thakapeshoko]] || [[word:jakapeshoko|jakapeshoko]] || [[word:shakapeshoko|shakapeshoko]] || [[word:kakapeshoko|kakapeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakapeshoko|thakapeshoko]] || [[word:jakapeshoko|jakapeshoko]] || [[word:shakapeshoko|shakapeshoko]] || [[word:kakapeshoko|kakapeshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
